catalog.name: Hazbin Hotel
catalog.description: In an attempt to find a non-violent alternative for reducing Hell's overpopulation, the daughter of Lucifer opens a rehabilitation hotel that offers a group of misfit demons a chance at redemption.

episodes.title: That's Entertainment (Pilot)
episodes.description: The original pilot episode where Charlie introduces her chaotic idea of rehabilitating demons to a skeptical audience via a live news broadcast.

episodes.title: Overture
episodes.description: Charlie pitches her plan to reduce Hell's overpopulation humanely to Heaven's representatives, while Vaggie tries to keep the hotel's commercial shoot on track.

episodes.title: Radio Killed the Video Star
episodes.description: The Overlords Vox and Valentino prepare to challenge Alastor's sudden return to the spotlight, putting the hotel's resident crew on high alert.

episodes.title: Scrambled Eggs
episodes.description: Carilla leads an intense meeting among Hell's top Overlords regarding the sudden vulnerability of the Exorcists, while Alastor plays a strategic chess game with Sir Pentious.

episodes.title: Masquerade
episodes.description: Angel Dust struggles to balance his demanding, abusive work schedule under Valentino with his quiet life and developing friendships back at the hotel.

episodes.title: Dad Beat Dad
episodes.description: Charlie's estranged father, Lucifer Morningstar, pays an unexpected visit to the hotel, leading to a clash of egos with the mysterious Radio Demon.

episodes.title: Welcome to Heaven
episodes.description: Charlie and Vaggie manage to secure a formal hearing in the pristine, rigid world of Heaven to advocate for the souls of repentant sinners.

episodes.title: Hello Rosie!
episodes.description: With a massive battle looming on the horizon, Charlie ventures into the creepy territory of Cannibal Town to recruit an eccentric army of allies.

episodes.title: The Show Must Go On
episodes.description: The countdown ends as the Exorcist army attacks. The hotel crew unites alongside unexpected friends to fight a desperate, explosive battle for survival.

episodes.title: New Pentious
episodes.description: Charlie's victory against Heaven has sinners flocking to the newly rebuilt Hazbin Hotel. But can she make sure they're all there for the right reasons? Meanwhile, Vox reveals his plan for the Vees to gain their ultimate victory.

episodes.title: Storyteller
episodes.description: Sir Pentious' redemption creates a stir in Heaven, but not everyone is happy to see a sinner redeemed.

episodes.title: Hazbin Hotel: Behind Closed Doors
episodes.description: Charlie invites Voxtek to do a piece on the Hotel and Pentious' redemption. But she will need hard proof to convince her skeptical guests.

episodes.title: It's A Deal
episodes.description: Charlie tries to do damage control by going live on television! Meanwhile, Alastor reaches his final straw.

episodes.title: Silenced
episodes.description: Vox hosts a rally for his increasing supporters. Meanwhile, Charlie looks to Heaven for help.

episodes.title: Scream Rain
episodes.description: Vox leads the overlords toward war with Heaven. Tensions run high at the hotel and Husk returns to his old ways.

episodes.title: Weapon of Mass Distraction
episodes.description: Vox unveils his secret weapon, giving Heaven their final warning.

episodes.title: Curtain Call
episodes.description: Vox (and the Vees, I guess) is hosting a party so everyone can watch him take over Heaven - and you're all invited!
